## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — structural change, no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — build, tooling, config
- [ ] `test` — tests only

## Checklist
- [ ] Builds without errors
- [ ] Linked to an issue above
- [ ] One concern only
